# Maximise Player Approvals with AI-Powered Fraud Fools

# Maximise Player Approvals with AI-Powered Fraud Fools

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

How to balance the competing needs of growing their playerbase and preventing fraud is a tough task that every sports betting and iGaming operator faces. The current regulatory landscape encourages excessive caution, which often results in legitimate players being turned away at the registration stage—but that doesn’t have to be the case.

In this webinar, our expert panelists will examine the full capabilities of the latest fraud decisioning technology and how it can be used to achieve the optimal block rate, reduce false positives and maximise customer acceptances.

They also share insights on how this AI-powered tech can improve the accuracy of fraud decisions, helping to protect revenue as well as increase it.

**In this session, you’ll learn:**

*   How to minimise false positives without exposing your business to risk
*   Practical ways to ensure compliance while speeding up player onboarding
*   Insights from compliance teams driving secure, scalable operations
*   The newest AI advancements helping you anticipate and respond to threats

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
